subject: Re: AW: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdfi
body_html: <html><head><meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8"></head><body dir="auto"><div><div style="direction: ltr;">Ok.

subject: Re: AW: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdfi
body:
Dear Ehud
Thanks for the kind words. Fine for me to proceed this way.
I will follow up with the contact details of alan
Best
NJ

Gesendet von meinem BlackBerry 10-Smartphone.
  Originalnachricht
Von: ehbarak
Gesendet: Samstag, 26. Dezember 2015 20:01
An: Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup
Cc: Epstein Jeffrey
Betreff: Re: AW: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdfi

Dear Nicole
Hope not something serious. You're still much more important than your money.
I'm glad to hear you're ready to join us. May I propose that Alan will talk to Udi Knaani, my lawyer - first. Then when he understands the situation and reports to you, he can call Darren, who is JE's lawyer and we can work it out.
The schedule is a little bit tight. About five weeks. But I'm sure they can make it with some guidance from us. And yes, it's still at the original low valuation.
Btw, the CEO already starts to look for Round A, which they expect to complete in some 4-5 months. Reporty will try to raise 7-10M  at a pre money valuation of $40M.
If that's more comfortable to you I can ask Udi to call Alan. I just need Alan's contact info.
Be well asap
Best
EB

Sent from my iPhone

> On 26 Dec 2015, at 06:28, Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup  wrote:
>
> Dear Ehud,
> I hope this mail finds you well. My apologies but I had to delegate as I underwent an operation and I am sorry for the misunderstanding this might have caused. Alan is not aware of the JE deal. For me I would be interested to invest into the round at the Lower valuation personally,In my case alan will continue with the documentation
> Happy holidays
> Nicole
>
> Gesendet von meinem BlackBerry 10-Smartphone.
>  Originalnachricht
> Von: ehbarak
> Gesendet: Mittwoch, 23. Dezember 2015 12:02
> An: Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup
> Cc: Epstein Jeffrey
> Betreff: Re: AW: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdf
>
>
> Dear Nicole
> Hope this email finds you well and happy.
> Amir, Reporty's CEO, told me that Alan called him and raise a possible interest of you to invest .5M if that's still in the original old valuation.
> It is somewhat regretful that Alan raised it with Amir rather than with me. Because me and JE didn't tell Reporty people of our arrangements. However, I don't see any major damage at this point.
> Anyhow, (if you've reached a conclusion that you're ready) we, JE and myself held this opportunity open for you. Of course it will make you an investor at the very first, old, low valuation.
> Please let us know if that's the case and Darren and Udi (JE and my lawyers respectively) can carry it on from here.
> If you need any further details for a decision to be made don't hesitate to call me.
> Best
> Ehud Barak
>
> Sent from my iPhone
>

body:
Dear Nicole
Hope not something serious. You're still much more important than your money. 
I'm glad to hear you're ready to join us. May I propose that Alan will talk to Udi Knaani, my lawyer - first. Then when he understands the situation and reports to you, he can call Darren, who is JE's lawyer and we can work it out. 
The schedule is a little bit tight. About five weeks. But I'm sure they can make it with some guidance from us. And yes, it's still at the original low valuation. 
Btw, the CEO already starts to look for Round A, which they expect to complete in some 4-5 months. Reporty will try to raise 7-10M  at a pre money valuation of $40M. 
If that's more comfortable to you I can ask Udi to call Alan. I just need Alan's contact info.
Be well asap
Best
EB

subject: Re: AW: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdfi
body:
Dear Ehud,
I hope this mail finds you well. My apologies but I had to delegate as I underwent an operation and I am sorry for the misunderstanding this might have caused. Alan is not aware of the JE deal. For me I would be interested to invest into the round at the Lower valuation personally,In my case alan will continue with the documentation
Happy holidays
Nicole

Gesendet von meinem BlackBerry 10-Smartphone.
  Originalnachricht
Von: ehbarak
Gesendet: Mittwoch, 23. Dezember 2015 12:02
An: Nicole Junkermann | Junkermanngroup
Cc: Epstein Jeffrey
Betreff: Re: AW: Reporty :151206_monthly_board_report_November.pdf

Dear Nicole
Hope this email finds you well and happy.
Amir, Reporty's CEO, told me that Alan called him and raise a possible interest of you to invest .5M if that's still in the original old valuation.
It is somewhat regretful that Alan raised it with Amir rather than with me. Because me and JE didn't tell Reporty people of our arrangements. However, I don't see any major damage at this point.
Anyhow, (if you've reached a conclusion that you're ready) we, JE and myself held this opportunity open for you. Of course it will make you an investor at the very first, old, low valuation.
Please let us know if that's the case and Darren and Udi (JE and my lawyers respectively) can carry it on from here.
If you need any further details for a decision to be made don't hesitate to call me.
Best
Ehud Barak

Sent from my iPhone

For me I would be interested to invest into the round at the Lower valuation personally,In my case alan will continue with the documentation
Happy holidays
